# CGPSConverterProgressCallback

**Type Alias**

Reports progress periodically during a PostScript conversion process.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias CGPSConverterProgressCallback = (UnsafeMutableRawPointer?) -> Void
```

## Parameters

- **info**: A generic pointer to private data shared among your callback functions. This is the same pointer you supplied to [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPSConverter/init(info:callbacks:options:)].
title: CGPSConverterProgressCallback
